category_sources: Official maturin repository describes building and publishing crates with PyO3, cffi, uniffi bindings, and Rust binaries as Python packages.
source_facts.description says Build and publish Rust crates as Python packages.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is maturin and official docs use the maturin name.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/PyO3/maturin, so repo was not redetermined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official maturin documentation covers Python package building from Rust projects.
source_facts.description identifies Rust-to-Python package build and publish functionality.
